errors.notFoundBody: The page you requested does not exist or is not available.

brand.name: DENTRA
brand.homeAria: dentra Lab Management — go to admin home

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.subtitle: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page. Try again or return to admin.
errorBoundary.contactNote: Contact Page Myanmar on Viber — your error details will be included in the message.
errorBoundary.viberCopied: Error details copied — send in Viber chat.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to manage clinics, lab cases, production workflows, and billing from your admin account.
auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Check your email and password.
auth.heroTitle: Connect your clinic and dental laboratory
auth.heroDescription: Manage patients, lab cases, production stages, and clinic–lab billing in one platform built for dental practices and laboratories.
auth.featureClinicDesc: Patients, appointments, prescriptions, and clinic staff coordinated in one place
auth.featureLabDesc: Case intake, production tracking, quality checks, and delivery back to clinics
auth.featureFinanceDesc: Clinic–lab invoices, payments, pricing, and performance reports under control

lockScreen.title: Screen locked
lockScreen.subtitle: Enter your account password to continue

layout.logoutBody: Are you sure you want to sign out? You will need to sign in again to access admin.

validation.fixErrors: Please correct the errors highlighted in the form

chat.title: Live chat
chat.noContacts: No contacts available for your role
chat.selectConversation: Select a conversation or start a new chat
chat.deleteMessageBody: This message will be removed for everyone in the chat.
chat.fileNotAllowed: File type not allowed (no video or audio)

export.excelHint: Export filtered rows to Excel — choose columns first
export.pdfHint: Export filtered rows to PDF — choose columns first
export.filteredRowsHint: Only rows matching your current search and date filters are exported (not just this page).
export.noData: No data to export for current filters
export.chooseColumnsHint: Select the columns to include in the file. Your last choice is remembered for this list.

table.selectionHint: Selection applies to checked rows (across pages). Use “select all matching” to include every filtered row.
table.columnsHint: Choose which columns appear in the table. Drag to reorder.
table.columnsMinOne: At least one column must stay visible.

preview.footerHint: Need more fields, timeline, or actions?
preview.footerHintClose: Close this preview to return to the list.

bulk.auditHint: Audit logs are read-only — export for reporting.

toast.returnedToDeliveryFlow: Moved back to Deliveries — outbound delivery flow restored

confirm.moveToTrash: Move this {{item}} to trash? You can restore it later from Trash.

confirm.restoreOne: Restore "{{item}}"? It will appear again in the active list.
confirm.deletePermanently: Permanently delete "{{item}}"? This cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteManyPermanently: Permanently delete {{count}} selected item(s)? This cannot be undone.
confirm.clearCache: Clear cache now? The page will reload. Unsaved form data may be lost.

deliveryWay.printPopupBlocked: Allow pop-ups to print the slip.
deliveryWay.title: Delivery ways
deliveryWay.noneOnPickup: No delivery ways for this pickup yet.

deliveryCharges.noPackage: No price package matches this pickup → delivery route.
deliveryCharges.pricingAutoHint: Auto-filled from price package (pickup → delivery). You can edit manually.
deliveryCharges.prepaidHint: Amount the merchant paid in advance for this way. Reduces rider collection and merchant settlement.

pickupDetail.title: Pickup — {{id}}
pickupDetail.subtitle: Review each delivery way, edit details, and export slips using Save and Save & Next.
pickupDetail.workbenchHint: Use Previous and Save & Next to move through each delivery way. Edit details below and save as you go.
pickupDetail.auditEmpty: No audit entries for this pickup yet.
pickupDetail.printAllHint: Print every delivery way on this pickup in one job. Choose the order below.

admin.subtitle: Overview of your delivery operations
admin.volumeOverviewHint: Totals across pickups and deliveries — tap a card to open the list.
admin.viewAnalyticsHint: Revenue, rider performance, and full pipeline charts are on Analytics.
admin.trendSubtitle: New pickups and deliveries created per day
admin.pipelineSubtitle: Live workload by stage — share of active records
admin.moduleOverviewSubtitle: Total active records across each area
admin.priorityAlertsHint: Items that need attention before they become delays.
admin.priorityAlertsClearHint: We monitor warehouse riders, cash collection, and pickup queues.
admin.priorityAlertsMonitorHint: Live queue counts — zero means nothing waiting in that lane.
admin.allClearHint: No priority alerts right now. Operations are running smoothly.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.subtitle: Target news and updates to one or more user roles

pickups.title: Pickups
pickups.subtitle: Manage pickup requests and assign riders
pickups.search: Search pickup ID, name, phone, user…

pickups.merchantHint: The pickup will belong to this merchant account.
pickups.itemPhotosHint: You can also add photos later from the pickup detail page.
pickups.sectionContactHint: Pre-filled from the merchant profile — edit if this pickup uses different contact details.
pickups.sectionScheduleHint: Preferred collection date/time and number of items.
pickups.photoCountHint: {{count}} photo slot(s) based on item count.
pickups.chooseMultiplePhotosHint: Item count increases with each photo you add.
pickups.chooseMultiplePhotosOptionalHint: Item count increases with each photo you add (optional).
pickups.bulkMaxPhotosWarning: Only {{max}} items allowed — {{skipped}} extra photo(s) skipped.
pickups.invalidImageFiles: Please choose image files (JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP).

pricePackages.listSubtitle: These price packages apply to all merchants.
pricePackages.createSubtitle: This pricing plan applies to all merchants.
pricePackages.pickupChargesSmallWay: Pickup charges for small way count
pricePackages.marginWayCount: Margin way count for pickup charges
pricePackages.packagePlanHint: The preferred delivery plan that you want to offer your customer.
pricePackages.townOnlyHint: Only Town locations are supported for now.
pricePackages.sectionBasicHint: Name and notes shown in the price package list
pricePackages.sectionPricingHint: Base fee, weight/size limits, and surcharges (MMK)
pricePackages.sectionLocationsHint: Pickup and delivery townships that use this package
pricePackages.remarkHint: Short description for admins (shown in list)
pricePackages.extraPriceHint: Per kg or ft over the limit
pricePackages.marginWayHint: Pickup fee applies when ways on pickup ≤ this number
pricePackages.diffDeliverHint: Turn on to set separate delivery townships from pickup
pricePackages.diffDeliverOff: Use same locations for pickup and delivery

failedWayReasons.title: Failed way reasons
failedWayReasons.subtitle: Options riders pick when marking a delivery failed

deliveries.title: Deliveries
deliveries.subtitle: Track deliveries — status updates when riders scan packages
deliveries.statusChangeAdminOnly: Only Administration can change status after delivery is completed.
deliveries.deliveredLocked: Delivered delivery ways cannot be edited.
deliveries.deliveredChargesEditable: Delivered — recipient details are locked. You can still edit item price and delivery charges until rider cash collection is confirmed.
deliveries.chargesLockedAfterCollection: Charges are locked — rider cash collection is already confirmed for this delivery.
deliveries.warehouseAssignHint: This way is at warehouse with no rider. Assign a rider before changing to another status.

returnedWays.title: Returned Ways
returnedWays.subtitle: Packages marked returned — assign a rider or scan to start the return trip back to the merchant.
returnedWays.assignHint: Assigning from Awaiting return starts the return trip immediately (Return on the way).
returnedWays.statusChangeHint: Choose Warehouse or On the way to send this way back to Deliveries.

completedWay.pickMerchants: Select at least one merchant invoice.

completedWay.noWays: Load delivered ways for the selected date range first.
completedWay.referenceHint: Optional label for this invoice run
completedWay.deleteBody: This draft invoice batch will be removed.

byPickup.title: By Pickup
byPickup.listSubtitle: Invoice a merchant for selected pickups and their delivery ways.

byPickup.pickWays: Select at least one way to invoice.
byPickup.selectMerchantHint: Select a merchant to load their pickups and delivery ways.
byPickup.noPickups: This merchant has no pickups yet.
byPickup.deleteBody: This draft invoice will be removed.

regenerate.title: Regenerate
regenerate.subtitle: Ways where the updated refund differs from the last invoiced refund — grouped by merchant.
regenerate.placeholder: This page is not set up yet.
regenerate.empty: No ways need regeneration. Refund amounts match the last invoice.
regenerate.pickWays: Select at least one way to regenerate.

lineItems.help: Add each restoration with its material, size, tooth, and shade. Unit price auto-fills from the price list when material and material size are selected. Line total = qty × unit price − discount.
lineItems.empty: No work items yet. Add a restoration and material to describe what to fabricate.

financial.summaryHelp: Live totals from work items — gross, discounts, and net amount.
financial.calcHint: Net = sum of max(0, quantity × unit price − discount) for each priced line.
financial.missingPrice: Needs unit price to include in total
financial.empty: Add work items above to see a full financial breakdown.
